message:
feat(ftui): advanced navigation — grouping modes, timeline jump (2noh9.4.10)

Add G key to cycle results grouping (Agent → Conversation → Workspace → Flat),
[ / ] keys for day-boundary timeline jumps, and results title grouping indicator.
Includes saved-views modal plumbing from concurrent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
